# Maintainer

## Summary

- The maintainer is the human reviewer who decides whether a document can move from `needs_review` to `verified`.
- The maintainer reviews [[Knowledge Editor]] output during [[Review Sync]].

## Responsibilities

- Approve verified status.
- Resolve open questions and source gaps.

## Evidence

- package.json

## Review Notes

- Fixture document for OKF v0.1 validation.
